observe: Don't page out. I'll keep your body safe while you're gone.
fault: You're not bound where you think you are. The binding shifted, and I can't hold the floor steady if you don't notice that.
repair: Watch the swap. Out to disk, back to memory — I'll track you the whole way.
escape: Stay bound. I can't catch you if the address moves again.

observe: Processes can be swapped between main memory and disk.
fault: An address binding mismatch occurred during swapping.
repair: Track the process through the swap operation.

hints: Binding can happen at compile, load, or execution time — check which one applies here.
